reviews.review_description: Movement is terrible, only forward or back and turning on same stick so half the time you end up totally losing the plot just to try and move. graphics are poor, guns are horrible to try to load and worse to shoot. So many good zombie games out there this one is simply awful. Wouldn’t recommend buying it even on sale.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, and we're truly sorry the game didn’t meet your expectations. 

You can move sideways using the right stick; Left stick is reserved for snap turns.

reviews.review_description:
This is an early-access game that attempts to blend survival mechanics with action-adventure elements. At its core, the game presents a promising concept: you must navigate a hostile environment and fend off threats to survive. 

However, as an early release, it shows signs of being a work in progress. The game currently lacks polish in several areas. The graphics, while not terrible, are not particularly impressive, and there are occasional bugs and glitches that can disrupt the flow of gameplay. The controls feel a bit clunky at times, which can be frustrating during combat or when performing precise actions.

On the plus side, the game's atmosphere is effective, with sound design and environmental storytelling that helps build tension. The dev seems active and engaged, providing feedback that could help the developers refine and improve the experience over time.

I will update my review and rating when the game is updated.  It has the potential to become a much better game, but in its current early-release state. If you enjoy survival games and don't mind dealing with some rough edges and ongoing development, it might be worth checking out. Otherwise, it might be best to wait for further updates and improvements before diving in.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to review our app!

We deeply appreciate your feedback and are committed to continually improving and enhancing your experience. Rest assured, your insights will help us make the app even better for everyone. Your support means a lot to us, and we're excited to bring you updates based on your suggestions.

If there's anything else you'd like to share, please don't hesitate to reach out. We’re always here to listen and improve!

UPDATE: We have released a new update addressing some of your feedback. (We're working on more, stay tuned!)

reviews.review_description: Keeps me on the edge, it is really smooth. Doesn't trigger my motionsickness. I was able to enjoy the game to the fullest.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review! 

We take motion sickness very seriously, and would like players to thoroughly enjoy the game without any compromises.

reviews.review_description:
It does feel like early access, so plenty of room for improvement.
Zombies look good, atmosphere is pretty spot on for this type of game.
I’m not to deep into so this review is based on what I have played so far.
Look forward to what the developer can add to this game.
I’m a huge zombie fan, there is room for more, this could be up there with the best with a few little fixes.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your review! We recently released an update with a lot of stabilization. 

We are working on adding more amazing stuff to the game in the near future, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
Fruit-Zen is fun and relaxing. Survival can get quite intense to go through waves. Protect is probably the most fun in my opinion.
Blowing zombies in this game is so exciting lol

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review! 

We're super glad you are enjoying the game, we will continue to make it even better.

reviews.review_title: BUY IT. IT'S WORTH THE MONEY.
reviews.review_description: I think the game meets its worth, or rather outdoes it. I enjoyed playing it. I have motion sickness so the movement options for motion sick people comes in handy. The game is not long, but good for coming back to. I think the zombies could get an update but besides that. ITS FUN.  Please add more snipers. I really enjoy the protect mode with them.

developer_response.body: Thank you for a great review! We are glad you are enjoying the game. We are constantly working on adding new things and improving the game further.
